headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Bets On Recurring Revenue After 38% Construction Sales Surge
summary: Caterpillar's Construction Industries segment recorded a 38% surge in sales, reflecting faster growth in this part of the business. The company is putting more emphasis on digital tools, equipment rental, and technology-driven recurring revenue streams. Caterpillar has outlined ambitious growth goals for 2030 that lean heavily on this shift in business mix. Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) is drawing fresh attention as its Construction Industries segment moves into the spotlight, backed by a 38%...
